theme: How might TU Delft improve first-year transition and belonging?

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: We need a comprehensive mentorship program with dedicated staff.

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: That would be great, but the budget for new initiatives is really tight this year.

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: Yeah, so maybe something smaller. We could use volunteers?

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: Volunteers could work. But would they stay committed?

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: What if we pair first-year ambassadors with newer international students?

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: That could tap into existing student leaders. Maybe start with just one faculty?
